description:
Alienware systems lights, fans, and power control tools and apps

AWCC alternative in 500kb. You can control your system lights (including hardware and software effects such as system parameters monitoring, ambient lights, sound haptic), fans, temperatures, power settings, and a lot more.
Important! If you are using tools for the first time, please read Beginner's guide and AlienFX-GUI readme to configure out its concept and operation principle.
Fan-SDK_V1.zip have binaries built against older fan control version, use it only in case you know what you're doing (or have Aurora R7), check readme file inside archive first to configure out how to make it working!
Changes into this release:
AlienFX-GUI:
- New: GUI improvement to help beginners who set lights first time:
  - All lights tabs: Clicking at the grid or at "Select from list" if no zone selected will automatically create zone (do not need to do it first)! Additionally, if no zone selected:
    - Colors tab: Clicking at "+" at Actions, color button or double-click empty action list will create a zone with one action assigned.
    - Events tab: Clicking at "+" at Events creates a zone with one event (selected settings).
    - Ambient tab: Clicking on the ambient grid creates a zone with selected grid position for Ambient effect.
    - Haptics tab: Clicking "+" at Reactions or any color button creates a zone with one reaction of selected color.
    - Grid tab: Double-click at colors list will create zone with default effect and colors.
- Bug fixed: incorrect grid block color after zone remove.
- Bug fixed: Removing last zone with effect doesn't stop it until profile change.
- Bug fixed: Incorrect refresh rate in Profiles after profile selection (empty instead of setting). It was a visual-only, refresh rate processing work correctly.
